transitions.name: physics4_scan_left_high
transitions.description: Latch left-dominant scan only from an explicitly armed interior state.

transitions.name: physics4_scan_left_mid
transitions.description: Latch mid left scan only from an explicitly armed interior state.

transitions.name: physics4_scan_right_high
transitions.description: Latch right-dominant scan only from an explicitly armed interior state.

transitions.name: physics4_scan_right_mid
transitions.description: Latch mid right scan only from an explicitly armed interior state.

transitions.name: physics2_join_left_high
transitions.description: Materialize high severity from a latched left source.

transitions.name: physics2_join_right_high
transitions.description: Materialize high severity from a latched right source.

transitions.name: physics2_join_left_mid
transitions.description: Materialize mid severity from a latched left source and advance the action phase.

transitions.name: physics2_join_right_mid
transitions.description: Materialize mid severity from a latched right source and advance the action phase.

transitions.name: physics2_contract_high
transitions.description: Interior contraction lowers high severity to mid.

transitions.name: physics2_contract_mid
transitions.description: Interior contraction lowers mid severity to zero and drops to the boundary.

transitions.name: physics11_boundary_discharge
transitions.description: Discharge latent action phase at the boundary before shell entry; this targets recurrent recovery without increasing action-rank jumps.

transitions.name: physics5_boundary_to_shell
transitions.description: Enter the latent shell only from a discharged boundary state.

transitions.name: physics9_shell_probe_left_high
transitions.description: Probe a left-high source from cleared shell and stage a latched shell marker.

transitions.name: physics9_shell_probe_right_high
transitions.description: Probe a right-high source from cleared shell and stage a latched shell marker.

transitions.name: physics9_shell_probe_left_mid
transitions.description: Probe a left-mid source from cleared shell and stage a latched shell marker.

transitions.name: physics9_shell_probe_right_mid
transitions.description: Probe a right-mid source from cleared shell and stage a latched shell marker.

transitions.name: physics9_shell_stage_release_left
transitions.description: Release staged left shell marker into the normal latched-shell path.

transitions.name: physics12_shell_stage_detour_left
transitions.description: Route staged left shell markers through a boundary detour before shell release to increase controllable path depth without changing action-rank phase.

transitions.name: physics12_shell_stage_detour_right
transitions.description: Route staged right shell markers through a boundary detour before shell release to increase controllable path depth without changing action-rank phase.

transitions.name: physics9_shell_stage_release_right
transitions.description: Release staged right shell marker into the normal latched-shell path.

transitions.name: physics10_shell_probe_neutral
transitions.description: Probe neutral shell states before interior rearm by staging a shell marker; this widens shell recurrence while preserving action-rank phase.

transitions.name: physics6_shell_refresh_left
transitions.description: Refresh a left-latched shell state by clearing the latch before cleared rearm.

transitions.name: physics6_shell_refresh_right
transitions.description: Refresh a right-latched shell state by clearing the latch before cleared rearm.

transitions.name: physics5_shell_to_interior_cleared
transitions.description: Re-arm the interior from a cleared shell state.

transitions.name: physics5_shell_to_interior_latched_left
transitions.description: Re-arm the interior from a shell state that still carries a left scan latch.

transitions.name: physics5_shell_to_interior_latched_right
transitions.description: Re-arm the interior from a shell state that still carries a right scan latch.

transitions.name: physics13_contract_mid_detour_nn
transitions.description: Targeted detour for the max-chain branch: discharge mid-contraction into a neutral latch before shell routing to increase path depth without introducing action-rank increases.

transitions.name: physics14_shell_high_rearm
transitions.description: Re-arm interior contraction for stalled high-severity shell states to recycle them into the controlled relaxation loop without increasing action-rank phase.

transitions.name: physics15_boundary_crossfeed_neutral
transitions.description: Narrow boundary cross-feed detour on the max-chain bottleneck state; adds a depth step while preserving action-rank phase.

transitions.name: physics16_boundary_discharge_high
transitions.description: Discharge high-severity boundary states into the shell-entry lane to reduce terminal mass while preserving action-rank monotonicity.

transitions.name: physics17_boundary_handoff_left_to_mid
transitions.description: Narrow boundary handoff on the max-chain tail to open an extra acyclic segment without changing action-rank phase.

transitions.name: physics18_boundary_discharge_mid
transitions.description: Discharge mid-severity boundary states into the shell-entry lane to further reduce terminal mass while preserving action-rank monotonicity.

transitions.name: physics19_tail_handoff_n0_to_nn
transitions.description: Single-state tail handoff on the max-depth branch: insert one extra acyclic step before the existing contract-mid discharge, preserving action-rank phase.

transitions.name: physics20_boundary_positive_discharge
transitions.description: Discharge positive action phase at the boundary into the shell-entry lane. This widens deterministic recurrence from the physics18/19 baseline while preserving source conservation and the current locality budget.

transitions.name: physics21_boundary_direct_reentry_mid
transitions.description: Directly re-enter the interior from a mid-severity boundary state once the positive action phase is already active and the latch is cleared. This is the first explicit boundary -> interior recovery rule on the 6-register carrier.

transitions.name: physics22_boundary_direct_reentry_high
transitions.description: Directly re-enter the interior from any high-severity boundary state (R3=high), leaving the action phase and latch untouched. This targets the remaining boundary terminal mass while keeping the exact V1 laws intact.

transitions.name: physics23_boundary_direct_reentry_low
transitions.description: Directly re-enter the interior from low-severity boundary states once a positive action pulse is active. This extends the physics22 re-entry pattern into the remaining low-severity boundary fringe while aiming to preserve the current fixed-walk and geometry surface.
